Description: Investigation started. Customer reported random 500 errors.
Checked logs for `frontend-canary-6d8d6d6d64-lf6vf`. Found `500` errors and `rpc error: code = Unavailable desc = name resolver error: produced zero addresses`.
Analyzed `frontend-canary` deployment. Found a typo in `PRODUCT_CATALOG_SERVICE_ADDR`: it's set to `productcatalogservices:3550` (plural) instead of `productcatalogservice:3550` (singular).
Confirmed the `frontend` service uses selector `app: frontend` which matches BOTH the healthy `frontend` and the broken `frontend-canary`.
Discovered `checkout-blackhole` VirtualService created ~18m ago. It was injecting a **100% 503 fault** for all traffic to `checkoutservice`.
Ran multiple `curl` tests. All returned `200 OK`. Service is stabilized.
